{{Quote|We could have stayed hidden in the swamps forever, if not for those accursed STAPs. They rooted us out of the trees like Gungans searching for gumbols.|Tobias Pall|<ref name="NEGVV">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>}}
'''Tobias Pall''' was a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[Security Guard/Legends|Security Guard]] of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Pall was rooted from Naboo's [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] by [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|Single Trooper Aerial Platforms]]. They were later present when [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] of the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] approached the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]] in hopes of gaining their allyship in fighting the Trade Federation.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Who's da uss-en uthers?|Boss Nass, regarding the Naboo|<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref>}}
[[File:Amidalas-cohort-approaches-Nass.png|thumb|left|300px|Tobias Pall (top left) accompanies Amidala to the Gungan Sacred Place.]]
Tobias Pall was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]'<ref name="Insider145" /> [[Security Guard/Legends|Security Guard]].<ref name="EpIGuide" /> During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]<ref name="NEGVV" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> they, along with a group of fellow Security Force members, were rooted out of the [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] by [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|Single Trooper Aerial Platforms]] via methods Pall stated were similar to the local [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] hunting for [[Gumbol/Legends|gumbols]].<ref name="NEGVV" />

The [[Officer/Legends|officer]] was present at the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]] when [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] of the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]]—after revealing her true identity and the use of a [[Sabé/Legends|decoy]]—approached the Gungan [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]] with an offer of alliance in an attempt to drive the Trade Federation off the planet. Pall followed Amidala's lead in kneeling before Nass and stood with her after the Gungan accepted the offer. Members of the Security Guard thereafter accompanied Amidala as the Naboo infiltrated the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|reconquered]] the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]], and captured [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]].<ref name="TPM" />

==Personality and traits==
Pall had [[Color/Legends|dark]] skin, brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="EpIGuide" />

==Equipment==
As a member of the Security Guard, Pall wore a mustard uniform with brown [[Armor/Legends|armor]], studded [[Limb/Legends|forearm]] plates, and [[Boot/Legends|boots]], along with Security Guard [[Helmet/Legends|headgear]] and a [[Belt/Legends|belt]]. They carried a [[CR-2 heavy blaster pistol]].<ref name="Ep1VD">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:NEGVV.jpg|thumb|right|200px|''The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels'' introduced the name "Tobias Pall."]]
Tobias Pall was created as a background character for the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], in which they were portrayed by an uncredited actor.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref> The character first appeared, however, in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Movie Storybook|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace Movie Storybook'']], which used a screenshot from the then-unreleased film that included Pall and was published by [[Random House]]<ref name="Storybook">[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Movie Storybook|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace Movie Storybook'']]</ref> in the [[April|month]]<ref name="Storybook date">{{RandomHouseOld|url=kids/catalog/display.pperl?isbn=0375800255|text=Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace Movie Storybook}}</ref> prior to the movie's release on [[May 19]].<ref name="TPM date">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''</ref> The name "Tobias Pall" was first used in the [[2003]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'', written by [[W. Haden Blackman]],<ref name="NEGVV" /> and the name was later attributed to the character from the film in "[[Rogues Gallery (department)|Rogues Gallery: Naboo's Finest!]]," included within the [[Star Wars Insider 145|145th issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine,<ref name="Insider145" /> which itself was released on [[October 22]], [[2013]].<ref name="Insider144">[[Star Wars Insider 144|''Star Wars Insider'' 144]]</ref>
